overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a rainy night walk through a historic city street resembling New Orleans (Saint Denis from Red Dead Redemption 2). The camera moves steadily forward along wet cobblestone streets with tram tracks, passing horse-drawn carriages and gas street lamps illuminating the misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with tram tracks and covered sidewalks

agents.ego_description: walking slowly down the wet cobblestone street between historic townhouses

notable_agents.action: person sitting on porch near outdoor wooden tables

entered.detail: wooden wagon with large spoked wheels parked on the left side of the street
multi-story stone building with wrought iron balconies and lit windows
two-story building with covered porch and warm lantern lighting
cast iron street lamp hanging over the road illuminating the rain
raised wooden platform with barrels and outdoor seating

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a historic city street. A horse-drawn carriage sits parked on the left while the camera moves forward along wet cobblestones with tram tracks. A person sits on the right porch near warm lantern light, and an overhead street lamp cuts through the heavy rain and mist.

events.description: passing the horse-drawn carriage, view opens toward street intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing straight down the street toward the open intersection

entered.detail: opening in the street where roads converge ahead

segments.scene_description: Having passed the carriage, the camera continues down the narrowing street toward an intersection. The overhead street lamp grows larger and brighter as the camera approaches, while the initial townhouses recede into the distance. The rain intensifies, creating ripples on the wet cobblestone surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with large historic mansion

events.description: camera begins turning right toward the large corner building

agents.ego_description: turning right to approach the illuminated corner mansion building

entered.detail: large three-story stone mansion with multiple balconies and warm interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right toward a grand corner mansion that dominates the view. The previous street recedes as the focus shifts to the imposing building facade with its lit windows and balconies. The rain continues to fall heavily, reflecting off the cobblestones as the camera approaches the mansion entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy historic city street that transitions from a narrow residential lane into a grand architectural vista. It begins by gliding past a parked horse-drawn carriage and a figure resting on a porch under the warm glow of lanterns, with an overhead street lamp cutting through the heavy mist. As the camera moves forward, the initial townhouses recede and the rain intensifies, creating deep ripples on the wet cobblestones and tram tracks while the overhead light grows larger and brighter. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right at an intersection, leaving the narrow street behind to face a grand corner mansion. Finally, the view is dominated by the imposing facade of the mansion, with its lit windows and balconies reflecting in the rain-slicked ground as the camera approaches the entrance.
